narrative:
Twinsburg Twp township has 2,811 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.7 percentage points.
